description: **MRC Global US** is hiring a Warehouse Associate in Atlanta to help manage inventory flow for an industrial supply operation serving the oil and gas industry. Day-to-day work includes pulling materials from bins, loading trucks, receiving new stock, and keeping the inventory database updated. A straightforward warehouse role if you're looking for steady, physical work.

**Bonus help (free):** WorkSource Cobb offers free career coaching, resume help, and job matching for Cobb County residents. If you're in the middle of a job search and could use some support, they're a great local resource to know about.

**Cobb County Sheriff's Office** is currently hiring. Open positions are posted on their careers page and have historically included both sworn law enforcement roles and civilian support positions. Worth checking if you're interested in public service work close to home.

**Cobb County** posts all of its open government positions through their careers page on governmentjobs.com, covering everything from parks and recreation to public works and administration. If a stable local government job is on your radar, the listing is regularly updated and worth bookmarking.
